articles.title: BlackRock Silently Buying Ethereum—Why Are We Scared?
articles.description: The world’s largest asset manager, BlackRock, has quietly funneled $513 million into Ethereum-based funds over six days, according to data shared by crypto analyst Ted (@Ted_analyst) on Feb 7, 2025. This marks one of the largest institutional inflows into Ethereum since BlackRock filed for a spot Ethereum ETF alongside Fidelity in May 2024. The move […] The post BlackRock Silently Buying...
